untranslatable_reason: Broadening Wedge pattern requires geometric analysis of trend line slopes, angle divergence, and multi-point touches across price action. This requires shape detection and trend line fitting algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern identification itself (megaphone shape, two up-sloping lines with different slopes, 3+ touches per side) cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic approximation using Donchian channels (price_pos_20 unavailable for wedge width expansion) and volume trend, but core pattern recognition is fundamentally untranslatable without geometric primitives. The signal relies on visual pattern analysis rather than quantitative thresholds.
